title: Snowz Day Counter
description:
Snowz DayCounter
is a lightweight and customizable Bukkit plugin that enhances your Minecraft experience by keeping an accurate track of in-game days and broadcasting the current day count to all players. This plugin also plays a configurable sound effect
body:
Snowz DayCounter
is a lightweight and customizable Bukkit plugin that enhances your Minecraft experience by keeping an accurate track of in-game days and broadcasting the current day count to all players. This plugin also plays a configurable sound effect to signify the start of a new day. Snowz DayCounter helps maintain an engaging environment for players to stay informed of their world's progress. Customize your day count message and toggle sound effects effortlessly with the config.yml file. Enhance your server's experience with Snowz DayCounter today!
